metadata.notes: Resolved and active prediction markets from March 2026. US-Iran escalation dominates. Khamenei confirmed dead. Fed holds rates. S&P 500 lowest close of 2026.

markets.question: Fed decision in March 2026?
markets.notes: 11-1 vote. Miran dissented. Dot plot projects 1 cut in 2026.

markets.question: Khamenei out as Supreme Leader of Iran by March 31?
markets.outcome: Yes - Iranian state TV confirmed death
markets.notes: One of most-traded geopolitical markets. Resolved after death confirmation.

markets.question: US military action against Iran before July?
markets.outcome: Yes - strikes began Feb 28, continued through March
markets.notes: Largest Polymarket geopolitical market. Trump ultimatum for ceasefire, Strait of Hormuz closure threats, Pentagon prep for ground operations.

markets.question: S&P 500 all time high by March 31, 2026?
markets.outcome: Pending - S&P 500 hit lowest close of 2026 in early March
markets.notes: Market under pressure from Iran tensions, tariff uncertainty, weakening employment data.

markets.question: February 2026 CPI
markets.notes: Inflation remained sticky. Fed March dot plot raised 2026 inflation projection.

us_recession_2026.notes: Up from 25.5% in Jan. Driven by: -92k nonfarm payrolls, Q4 GDP miss (1.4%), unemployment at 4.4%.

fed_rate_hike_2026.notes: Up from 11.5% in Jan. Rising oil prices from Iran tensions and sticky inflation.

fed_emergency_cut_2027.notes: Up from 13% in Jan. Iran crisis and employment weakness increase tail risk.

btc.notes: Recovery from Feb lows. Still well below Jan highs.

eth.notes: Continued weakness. Vitalik selling pressure noted.

sol.notes: Underperforming BTC and ETH on relative basis.
